name: bot-014-kinetic-text
description: Make a Kinetic Text video end-to-end from a single request. Take any short message (pasted text OR a URL) — an announcement, product update, quote, stat, or headline — structure it into a faithful MessageDoc, then render a styled animated-text MP4 in one of nine styles (Kinetic Typography, Box Reveal, Giant Word, Perspective 3D, Pixel Reveal, Blur Carousel, Breaking News, Headline Highlight, Minimal Editorial) with a background score, at any aspect ratio (16:9, 9:16, 1:1). This is the ONE do-everything entry point for the Kinetic Text bot — use it whenever someone wants an animated-text video and does not want to think about steps. It orchestrates the granular skills (bot-014-script-builder then bot-014-text-animator) and never fabricates facts.

inputs.name: message-text
inputs.description: Pasted message — a headline and/or body (announcement, update, quote, stat). One of text/url is required.

inputs.name: source-url
inputs.description: A URL to the message/article; fetched + extracted. One of text/url is required.

inputs.name: style
inputs.description: One of the 9 style ids (kinetic-typography, box-reveal, giant-word, perspective-3d, pixel-reveal, blur-carousel, breaking-news, headline-highlight, minimal-editorial). Default = the doc's recommended style, else minimal-editorial.

inputs.name: aspect-ratios
inputs.description: Any of 16:9, 9:16, 1:1 (space/comma separated). Default = onboarding default, else 9:16.

inputs.name: mood
inputs.description: calm | dramatic | upbeat | tech — the background score. Default = derived from style + tone.

inputs.name: music
inputs.description: on or off — whether to include the background score. Default on.

inputs.name: font-pack
inputs.description: modern | editorial | bold | tech — the typography pairing. Default = brand font pack from context.md, else modern.

inputs.name: brand
inputs.description: Brand kit — accent color (hex), optional accentAlt + label, and fontPack. Default from context.md, else a neutral accent + the modern font pack.

outputs.name: messagedoc
outputs.description: The structured, provenance-tracked MessageDoc (the render contract).

outputs.name: storyboard
outputs.description: Scenes + frame ranges + on-screen text + style/AR/mood/defaults used.

outputs.name: videos
outputs.description: One rendered MP4 (with a background score) per requested aspect ratio.
